titleStmt.title: SII 26.127: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 127. (A.R. No. 121 of 1909.) KOMARALIṄGAM, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north base of the Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple.

This damaged inscription records the grant of land as maḍappuṟam to god Kariyapirāṉ of Śrī-Kumaraṅgavīma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu by Tiruppēṟpālāśiriyaṉ Śrī-Vāsudēvaṉ Śrī-Nārasiṅgabhaṭṭa-sōmayāji alias Vīraśōḻa-Brahmēndraṉ who is stated to have received the land from Perumāḷ Vīraśōḻa-dēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . korājakesaripanmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīviranārāyaṇa- devaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu tiruppeṟpālāciriyaṉ śrī vāsudevaṉ śrī nārasiṅha bhaṭṭassomayājiyāṉa viracoḻa brahmandraṉeṉ karaivaḻināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrī kumaraṅkavimaccaturvvedimaṅkalattuk kariyapi kuṭuttapaṭiyā
tiru Amutuceyya maṭappuṟattukku viṭṭa nilamāvatu vaikāvināṭṭu Amarapuyaṅkarac caturvvedimaṅkalattu viranārāyaṇavatikkuk kiḻakkuk keraḷakesarivāykkālukku vaṭakku muṉṟāñ catirattu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇikkiḻaraiyum ma ṟappin ṉilam mu raiyu ta
vaṭakku nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Añcāñ catirattu Oru pūttaṟaiyil ṉilaṅ kāṇiaraik kāṇiyum Ākanilam cima¿ Innilam mākāṇiaraikkāṇiyum perumāḷ viracoḻa devar Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṉakkut tiruviḷḷañceytapaṭiye maṭappuṟamāka viṭṭeṉ Ivviracoḻa
vaiṣṇavarkaḷ rakṣai ḥ§
Digital edition of SII 26.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
